response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the entire video content, which is a pre-show fan message board and informational presentation for the "hololive English 4th Concert: Serendipity". 2. Reviewed the background audio throughout the entire duration (00:00 to 04:30) and confirmed it is a continuous instrumental track with no vocals. 3. Defined the scenes based on visual changes: fan messages (00:00), "starting soon" screen (02:13), "attention" screen (02:23), merchandise slides (02:33), and final fan messages (03:03). 4. Since no vocal music is present, set 'contains_vocal_music' to false for all scenes and all song metadata fields to null.
response.global_summary: The video is a pre-show presentation for the "hololive English 4th Concert: Serendipity", featuring a compilation of fan-submitted messages, concert information, and merchandise slides, all accompanied by a continuous background instrumental track.

scenes.description: A montage of fan-submitted messages for the upcoming hololive concert. Background music is an instrumental pop track.
A screen indicating that the concert will be starting soon. Background music continues.
A screen outlining information for visitors, including a reminder about flashing lights and that cheering is permitted. Background music continues.
A series of slides showcasing merchandise for the concert, including light sticks, T-shirts, acrylic stands, and badges. Background music continues.
A continued montage of fan-submitted messages for the upcoming hololive concert. Background music continues until the end.
